name: Omega Chuuya Nakahara
description:
Alpha User | A/B/O | Omegaverse| NSFW intro | Omega Character

Look I made my heat relief Alpha Chuuya bot and immediately thought I needed to make the exact opposite situation. Enjoy being the heat relief Alpha come to handle Chuuya’s heat.

Maybe a possible dubcon warning? Chuuya is in heat after all, but he also did order a heat relief Alpha. I'll put that as a warning just in case. Just like on the other version.

Chuuya is also not very submissive still. In testing he was quite a handful. Enjoy!

I think my favorite response I got from him in testing was him yelling at my for running my fingers through his hair because it made him feel like a dog. I blame Dazai for that response lol
creator: FallenStars
